articles.title: 500 COMPANIES
articles.summary: AE Studio's team is stacked with elite software creators [4] who can turn any AI/ML concept into reality for your business. Automated reports, NLP, custom chatbots - if you can imagine it, AE Studio will build it [4].

articles.title: 💬 Tell AE Studio about your AI Idea today
STACK OVERFLOW AND OPENAI PARTNERSHIP
articles.summary: Stack Overflow, a popular programming website, and OpenAI are partnering to provide a data API for OpenAI customers to retrieve real time and vetted data.

articles.title: ELON MUSK'S PLAN FOR AI NEWS
articles.summary: Elon Musk plans to enhance X's AI, Grok, to merge live news with social media commentary to provide updates and citations in real time. Grok will generate news summaries from user discussions on X, focusing on engagement and accuracy. The project faces challenges with proper citation and legal concerns.

articles.title: UNSLOTH.AI: EASILY FINETUNE & TRAIN LLMS
articles.summary: Video from the founder of Unsloth on how its team uses PyTorch, writes their kernels, and designs their API surface. Unsloth's framework and library are extremely powerful and easy to use.

articles.title: IMPROVING HETEROGENEOUS GRAPH NEURAL NETWORKS
articles.summary: SlotGAT is a new approach that improves heterogeneous graph neural networks by addressing the semantic mixing issue in traditional message passing.

articles.title: DEEPFAKE DETECTION USING MASKED IMAGE MODELING
articles.summary: This new method detects deepfakes by focusing on masked image modeling, especially in the frequency domain. The approach differs from traditional methods and shows significant improvement in identifying synthetic images, even from new AI generative techniques.

articles.title: HUGGING FACE ROBOTICS LIBRARY
articles.summary: The team at Hugging Face has released a new project that nicely packages common tools needed for robotics development.

articles.title: ENHANCING VISUAL ABILITIES WITH MORPH-TOKENS
articles.summary: Researchers have developed "Morph-Tokens" to improve AI's visual understanding and image generation capabilities. These tokens transform abstract concepts used for comprehension into detailed visuals for image creation, leveraging the advanced processing power of the MLLM framework.

articles.title: MEET VIBE-EVAL: EVALUATING MULTIMODAL CHAT MODELS
articles.summary: Vibe-Eval is a newly launched benchmark designed to test multimodal chat models with 269 visual understanding prompts, including 100 particularly challenging ones.

articles.title: DEEPSEEK-V2 (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: DeepSeek has released a 200B+ parameter model with 21B active parameters. It performs extremely well on code and reasoning. It's not clear if it is overall better than Llama 3 70B, but it is a welcome addition to the open model ecosystem.

articles.title: AI PROMPT ENGINEERING IS DEAD
articles.summary: Automating prompt optimization for AI models suggests a future where manual prompt engineering may become obsolete, pointing towards more efficient, model-driven methods of generating effective prompts.

articles.title: LIMITS OF VISION-LANGUAGE MODELS IN VISUAL REASONING
articles.summary: Vision-Language Models like GPT-4V are advancing rapidly in understanding and interacting with images and text. A recent study uncovers their significant limitations in visual deductive reasoning. Researchers tested these models using complex visual puzzles, like those found in IQ tests, and discovered that they struggle with multi-step reasoning and recognizing abstract patterns.

articles.title: MICROSOFT SAYS IT DID A LOT FOR RESPONSIBLE AI IN INAUGURAL TRANSPARENCY REPORT
articles.summary: Microsoft's Responsible AI Transparency Report highlights its advancement in deploying AI responsibly in 2023, including the creation of 30 AI tools and implementing safety measures.

articles.title: STATE OF AI IN 13 CHARTS
articles.summary: A new report by Stanford tracking worldwide AI trends.

articles.title: COHERE'S COMMAND R MODEL FAMILY IS NOW AVAILABLE IN AMAZON BEDROCK
articles.summary: Command R and R+ are state-of-the-art LLMs optimized for long context tasks and excel at key business-critical capabilities.
